name: tower-art-foundry
description: MCP server for the Tower Art Foundry - list canon, fetch promoted Asset Packs, generate new modality artifacts, get copy-paste integration snippets.

tools.name: foundry/canon_get
tools.summary: Fetch one canon entry by id (returns YAML-as-JSON).

tools.name: foundry/asset_pack_list
tools.summary: List promoted Asset Packs filtered by kind/character/space.

tools.name: foundry/asset_pack_get
tools.summary: Fetch one Asset Pack manifest + file paths.

tools.name: foundry/asset_pack_integration
tools.summary: Get a copy-paste TSX integration snippet for one pack.

tools.name: foundry/slot_audit
tools.summary: List registered slots that lack a promoted Asset Pack.

tools.name: foundry/generate
tools.summary: Queue a new generation run; returns a runId in `queued` status.

tools.name: foundry/generate_status
tools.summary: Poll a runId; returns phase, percent, blockers, ETA, promoted packId.

tools.name: foundry/diagnostics
tools.summary: Daemon health + provider reachability + last 5 runs + backlog depth.
